reference: I am forty-six years old and have been diagnosed with cervical cancer. I have had a polyp and a cone biopsy done within the past three weeks. I have been having a foul-smelling discharge from my vagina and am wondering if there is something I can do while I wait for the scans and radiation to begin to help with the smell.
text: i am 46 years old and have been diagnosed with cervical cancer i have had a polyp and a cone biopsy done within the past three weeks i have been having a foul smelling discharge from my vagina and i'm wondering if there is something i can do while i wait for the scans and radiation to begin to help with the smell
